indicators.name: sink in corner
indicators.rationale: The presence of a sink in the corner obstructs the open floor space required for yoga.

indicators.name: cabinets along wall
indicators.rationale: Cabinets along the wall reduce the available floor space and create visual clutter.

indicators.name: dark flooring
indicators.rationale: Dark flooring can be slippery and less suitable for yoga practice.

indicators.name: no open floor area visible
indicators.rationale: There is no unobstructed floor space available for yoga.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is marginally adequate for yoga due to the presence of a sink and cabinets, which obstruct the open floor space required for yoga. The dark flooring also presents a potential safety hazard. The score of 3 reflects the limited available space and the presence of potential hazards.
